mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, password_salt, role, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{passwordSalt}, #{role}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET role = #{role} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET password_hash = #{hash}, password_salt = #{salt} WHERE id = #{id}
